name: @context-engine/editor-core
description: The M9 editor-core web app (design 04 section 1). Bundled at BUILD time by the SHA-pinned esbuild into a static asset the Shell serves over the context-editor:// scheme; there is no Node at runtime and no npm install in CI. Dependencies are acquired ONLY through the pinned, SHA-verified, fail-closed fetch channels under tools/ (see ../README.md) — this manifest declares them so the deny-by-default license gate (tools/check_licenses.py) sees them, it is NOT an install manifest. There is deliberately no `scripts` block either: the build is driven by CMake (../CMakeLists.txt) through the pinned esbuild + tsgo binaries, never by npm.
